_comment: Template for .local/owners.json — used by scripts/seed_initial.py to populate the users/user_identities/business_memberships tables. Copy this file to .local/owners.json (gitignored) and replace the placeholder values with real owner emails. The 'id' field is a stable UUID — generate one per owner and don't change it (it's the foreign key target across the system). Admin users can manage other users; owners can only manage their own tasks. Businesses are RedHot or Borderline (or both for shared admins).
